zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thurstan de Holand於大約1222年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Sir Robert de Holland I26歲，母親Cecily de Columbers22歲。他於大約1245年與de Kellet結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1275年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thurstan de Holand于大约1222年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Holland I26岁，母亲Cecily de Columbers22岁。他于大约1245年与de Kellet结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1275年在英国英格兰藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Thurstan
meanings: An old name. The same as the Old and Middle High German names Turstan, Thurstan, Turstein, signifying 'Thor's stone;' figuratively 'Thor's defence;' from Anglo-Saxon stdn, Old Norman steinn. It is found Latinised Turstanus. Thor is found in many old names, as Thurgar, Thurgood, Thurkettle, Thurkle, Thurtle.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thurstan de Holand was born about 1222, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Holland I, was 26 and his mother, Cecily de Columbers, was 22. He married de Kellet about 1245. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1275, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thurstan de Holand est né environ 1222, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Holland I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Columbers, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé de Kellet environ 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1275, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thurstan de Holand um 1222 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Holland I 26 und seine Mutter Cecily de Columbers 22. Er hat um 1245 de Kellet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thurstan de Holand è nato il circa 1222 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Holland I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Columbers, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato de Kellet circa 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1275, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thurstan de Holandが約1222年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Holland Iは26歳，母Cecily de Columbersは22歳であった。約1245年にde Kelletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1275年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thurstan de Holand(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Holland I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Columbers(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1245년 de Kellet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com de Kellet aproximadamente 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1275, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thurstan de Holand родился около 1222 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Holland I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Columbers, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени de Kellet около 1245 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1275 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
